codeReview.summary: The implementation in src/lib/dashboard/insights.ts satisfies the feature requirements: all 4 P0 rules are present with the specified priorities and view scoping, insights are evaluated in priority order with max-3 capping, dismissed types are skipped with lower-priority backfill, and insight bodies include interpolated values. The accompanying test suite in src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/insights.test.ts covers rule firing, ordering, cap behavior, dismissal/backfill, and viewType scoping.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill prescribes TDD (write failing tests before implementation), but this worker implemented insights.ts before creating insights.test.ts while handoff skillFeedback still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session ff02a616-996f-45ed-8f3d-32124b120da3 shows `Create .../insights.ts` preceding `Create .../__tests__/insights.test.ts`; .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md step 3 requires writing tests first and running them failing before implementation.
